overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring an ornate gothic castle interior with marble floors, vaulted ceilings, and intricate stained glass. The character walks through a grand hall into a long corridor before turning into a side antechamber with a large wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with large stained glass window

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall toward the corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction toward the corridor

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass window with intricate tree and face design in blue and purple tones
decorative carved stone pillar with elaborate capital
simple wooden bench against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic hall with a magnificent stained glass window dominating the far wall. Marble floors reflect the mixed lighting from chandeliers and colored glass. Another pedestrian walks ahead toward the corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: long vaulted corridor with stone railings

events.description: exits the grand hall and enters the long corridor with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor passing other pedestrians in period clothing

notable_agents.action: passing by on the left walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: high ribbed stone vault ceiling with Gothic arches
ornate stone balustrade running along the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, enclosed corridor with high vaulted ceilings and stone railings on the right. The lighting becomes dimmer and more artificial. Other NPCs walk in both directions, and the grand hall with its stained glass is now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: small antechamber with large wooden door

events.description: turns left into the side antechamber approaching the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: turning left into the side room and walking toward the large wooden door at the end

notable_agents.action: passing by on the left side of the frame walking opposite direction

entered.detail: tall double wooden doors with metal handles and decorative carved panels
large potted palm plant in an ornate stone urn

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a smaller, dimly lit antechamber featuring a large wooden door at the far end. A potted palm sits to the right, and the space feels more enclosed than the main corridor. The character approaches the door as another pedestrian passes by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a luminous, grand gothic hall into the intimate, dim confines of a private antechamber. It begins by trailing a character across reflective marble floors toward a magnificent stained glass window that floods the space with colored light. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a long, enclosed corridor with high vaulted ceilings and stone railings, where the bright natural light fades into a dimmer, artificial glow. The camera then turns left, transitioning from the bustling corridor into a smaller, quiet antechamber featuring a potted palm. Finally, the movement narrows as the character approaches a large wooden door at the far end of the enclosed space.
